violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the backroom area, is not tight-fitting (Large gap at the base of the door). Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Weather stripping to be added to ensure door closes tightly sealing any gaps allowing for possible rodent/pest entry. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2026

The walk-in cooler was observed maintaining an ambient temperature of 45-46 degrees Fahrenheit at the time of inspection (Ice buildup observed on the backside of the condenser unit). Time/Temperature Control for Safety (TCS) Foods requiring refrigeration for storage are not to be stored in the walk-in cooler until serviced/repaired. No TCS Foods were observed stored in the walk-in cooler at the time of inspection. Unit is to be adjusted/repaired and operating with ambient temperature 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below for proper storage of TCS Foods prior to use for TCS Foods. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026
The employee bathroom is lacking a covered waste receptacle. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026

The dumpster outside is located on grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Dumpsters to be relocated to the paved area or a concrete/asphalt pad to be created for their storage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2026

The walk-in cooler and employee bathroom were observed to have a buildup of debris/items. Physical facilities are to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep it clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026
The hand-washing sink in the employee bathroom was lacking paper towels. Drying provision provided at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025

The door to the outside, located in the backroom area, is not tight-fitting (Large gap at the base of the door). Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Weather stripping to be added to ensure door closes tightly sealing any gaps allowing for possible rodent/pest entry. New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2026

The walk-in cooler was observed maintaining an ambient temperature of 49 degrees Fahrenheit at the time of inspection. Time/Temperature Control for Safety (TCS) Foods requiring refrigeration for storage are not to be stored in the walk-in cooler until serviced/repaired. (At the time of inspection, there were no TCS Foods observed stored in the walk-in cooler. Employee informed of findings and milk order was canceled at time of inspection.) New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2026

The dumpster outside is located on grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Dumpsters to be relocated to the paved area or a concrete/asphalt pad to be created for their storage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2026
The walk-in cooler was observed to have a buildup of debris/items. Unit is to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep it clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2025
The hand-washing sink in the bathroom was lacking paper towels. Paper towels provided at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
The condensate from the refrigeration unit is draining into the bathroom hand sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2024

At the time of inspection, the outside dumpster was not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024

The area around the outdoor garbage/refuse dumpster was observed to have an accumulation of garbage and/or debris. A storage area for REFUSE, recyclables, or returnables shall be maintained free of unnecessary items and clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
